title: The metaCommons Charter
purpose: Transform sovereign signals into collective intelligence while preserving privacy, sovereignty, and citizen rights.

theCommons.definition: A continuously evolving field generated from the interaction of sovereign assets and sovereign activity across the Polity.

commonsLearning.purpose: improve the Polity's ability to align truthful information with valuable outcomes

constitutionalPrinciple: The metaCommons exists to discover capability latent within the Polity and make that capability legible without compromising sovereignty.
engineStatus: constitutional_only — the operational metaCommons engine (PoWP aggregation, the Commons field, PoTS learning) is a later workstream.
